---
name: Framework adapter/importer request
about: Ask for a new target framework (adapter) or source format (importer)
labels: framework-support
---

**Framework / format name and link**

**Direction wanted**
- [ ] Adapter (AgentDef → framework file)
- [ ] Importer (framework file → AgentDef)
- [ ] Both

**Where agent definitions of this format live in the wild**
(repos, marketplaces, docs — sample files help enormously; importers here are
validated against real corpora, not just specs)

**Anything unusual about the format?**
(frontmatter dialects, multi-file layouts, embedded code blocks...)
